name: NRHIS Sprint 2 Build047 Pre-Push CI Parity Gate
features: run a local pre-push gate that mirrors required GitHub CI commands
compile Python sources and tests before push
run Ruff, branch coverage, and whitespace validation as one evidence-backed gate
write a machine-readable CI parity receipt outside the repository
stop before commit and push when CI parity fails
preserves: automatic CI diagnostics and repair guidance
automatic decline of locked-directory deletion retries
